title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
